title: raukaua gunnii
intro: Raukaua gunnii, also known as the New Zealand pepper tree, is a native New Zealand plant that belongs to the genus Raukaua in the family Araliaceae. The leaves and bark of the raukaua gunnii plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce pain, alleviate respiratory problems, and support digestive health. Raukaua gunnii can be prepared for medicinal use in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
